name: platform-onboarding
description: Platform onboarding mission: drive the organization-integration flow end-to-end — discovery transcript → requirements draft → design spec → test plan → task plan → (operator runs execute-task-plan separately). The pipeline itself is a single-shot orchestration of the 4 artifact-producing steps; task execution and deploy run downstream pipelines with their own approval gates.

params.additional_context: Kyberion を組織固有環境（CI/CD / STT / 音声エンジン / 承認チャネル / SIEM / シークレット管理）に統合するための design。必ず SpeechToTextBridge / DeploymentAdapter / AuditForwarder / SecretResolver の 4 契約ポイントへの adapter 対応を components に含める。

params.message: Onboarding artifacts for {{project_name}}: requirements v{{requirements.version}} / design v{{design.version}} / test plan v{{test_plan.version}} / task plan v{{task_plan.version}} ({{task_plan.task_count}} tasks). Next: pnpm pipeline --input pipelines/execute-task-plan.json
